Name: MAP_OBJECT_INSTANCE_TYPE_PARAM
Description: Defines physical properties, durability, break behavior, and physics response characteristics for different map object instance types.

Fields.Name: Size Type
Fields.Description: Defines whether the object is classified as small or large for gameplay and physics handling.

Fields.Name: Weight Type
Fields.Description: Defines the object's weight category, affecting physics and interaction behavior.

Fields.Name: Breakable Action Type
Fields.Description: Defines which player actions can break this object type.

Fields.Name: Durability Type
Fields.Description: Defines structural durability of the object.

Fields.Name: HP
Fields.Description: Hit points of the object; determines how much damage it can take before breaking.

Fields.Name: Impact Resistance
Fields.Description: Resistance against collision forces and physical impacts.

Fields.Name: Mass
Fields.Description: Physical mass of the object used in physics simulation.

Fields.Name: Friction Coefficient
Fields.Description: Determines how much the object resists sliding against surfaces.

Fields.Name: Bounciness
Fields.Description: Determines how much the object bounces after impact.

Fields.Name: Object Damage Attack Attribute
Fields.Description: Defines the attack or damage attribute type applied by or to the object.

Fields.Name: Hit Rumble Strength
Fields.Description: Maximum intensity of camera or controller shake when the object is hit.

Fields.Name: Hit Rumble Duration
Fields.Description: Duration of the rumble/shake effect when the object is hit.
